title: Data Enhancement Path
description: Build fluency in Data Enhancement inside Data Preprocessing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Data Augmentation
steps.summary: Techniques used to artificially increase the size of a dataset by applying transformations to existing data. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Augmentation. It opens into DL (Data Augmentation) and GAN-based Data Augmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Data Enhancement — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.

steps.title: Adjacent Bigram Swap
steps.summary: Adjacent Bigram Swap belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Bigram Swap.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Data Enhancement. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Antonym Swap
steps.summary: Antonym Swap belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Compare it with Trigram Swap and Synonym Swap.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Data Enhancement. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Appositive Swap
steps.summary: Appositive Swap belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Compare it with Trigram Swap and Synonym Swap.

steps.title: Bigram Swap
steps.summary: Bigram Swap belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Data Enhancement. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Compare it with Random Bigram Swap and Adjacent Bigram Swap. It opens into Random Bigram Swap and Adjacent Bigram Swap.
